narrative: Trump's termination of the Iran memorandum at the NATO summit drives geopolitical risk premiums, sending WTI crude +5.64% higher to $74.4 and lifting CAD. USD/CAD retreats to 1.4162 as oil gains, while USD/JPY consolidates at 162.478 under the weight of a strong put skew with 25d RR at -1.52. Cross-asset risk-off flows remain marginal under a mixed regime: gold lower -1.78%; equities -0.45%; DXY +0.06%; VIX 18.4. Watch the RBNZ rate decision at 02:00 UTC tomorrow.
